full_description: Boost your productivity with FocusZone! This app helps you stay on track by blocking distracting websites, tracking your time, and setting goals for your work sessions. With FocusZone, you can prioritize your tasks, avoid procrastination, and achieve more in less time. Key features include: website blockers, time tracking, goal setting, and priority management. Download FocusZone now and take control of your productivity!
